A test case to verify division of a boolean value by a number in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks if the division of the boolean value `true` by the number `1` results in the number `1`. The expression `true / 1` implicitly converts the boolean `true` to the number `1`, and the assertion verifies that this conversion and division operation behaves as expected in JavaScript. This code provides narrow functionality, serving as a basic test to confirm the behavior of type coercion and arithmetic operations in the JavaScript language.
